MaxLineLength:EventsComponents.kt$val customType = if (event.type != EventType.OTHER) eventTypes.find { it.key == event.type.name } ?: eventTypes.find { it.name == event.type.name } else event.customTypeName?.let { ctn -> eventTypes.find { it.name == ctn } }
